message:
fix(aggregator): saturating counter + clamped loss_rate; audit batch 475 (8 files SOUND)

transport/aggregator.rs:
- unique_symbols: fetch_update with checked_sub prevents u64 wraparound
- quality_score: clamp loss_rate to [0,1] prevents NaN in path selection

Audit batch 475 (manual):
- io/cap.rs (2899L) SOUND — first-ever audit, capability model correct
- messaging/control.rs (3895L) SOUND — CRDT semantics verified
- obligation/leak_check.rs (2423L) SOUND — abstract interpretation correct
- cx/registry.rs (3510L) SOUND — identity verification on commit_permit
- distributed/recovery.rs (2382L) SOUND — proper error handling
- net/worker_channel.rs (2626L) SOUND — job lifecycle correct
- http/h1/http_client.rs (3452L) SOUND — pool degradation is intentional
- transport/aggregator.rs (3945L) FIXED — 2 LOWs fixed

4 agent audits still in progress (~20K lines: consumer.rs, diagnostics.rs+ir.rs,
redis.rs+stream.rs, browser_stream.rs+wasm_abi.rs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
